title: rosa reuteri var. genuina
intro: Rosa reuteri var. genuina, also known as wild rose, is a plant species belonging to the Rosa genus, characterized by its fragrant flowers and thorny stems. The medicinal properties of Rosa reuteri var. genuina lie in its anthocyanins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Rosa reuteri var. genuina can be consumed as a herbal tea, infused oil, or dried flower extract, with recommended dosages and preparations varying depending on the intended use.
